title: Houston Police Bodycam & Records – 2022 Kidnapping and Officer-Involved Shooting (Melvin Porter)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Maryland Public Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am submitting this request on behalf of my professional YouTube news and educational channel that reports on police interactions, body camera footage, public safety incidents, and transparency in law enforcement. Our content is journalistic in nature, aimed at informing the public about police procedures and accountability through factual, narrated analysis of public records.

Pursuant to the Texas Public Information Act (Texas Government Code Chapter 552), I hereby request the following records related to the 2022 kidnapping and officer-involved shooting involving Melvin Porter, which began in Houston and concluded in Splendora, Texas.

Please provide:

All body-worn camera (BWC) footage recorded by your agency’s officers and any assisting officers or units involved in responding to, pursuing, or engaging the suspect, including footage from initial response through the final officer-involved shooting.

All in-squad/dash camera video from vehicles involved in the response, pursuit, or scene containment.

Any aerial footage (helicopter or drone) associated with the incident, if available.

The full incident/offense report, including supplements, narratives, and releasable witness statement summaries.

911 call audio recordings and dispatch logs related to the kidnapping and subsequent police response.

Any other releasable investigative summaries, arrest reports, or officer-involved shooting review documents.

If the volume of responsive video is large, I am willing to prioritize body-worn camera footage capturing the final confrontation and officer-involved shooting.

Case identification details (from public reporting):

Date range: August 22–23, 2022 (incident culminating in officer-involved shooting on August 23, 2022)

Location: Initial kidnapping in Houston, Texas; conclusion in Splendora, Texas (parking lot confrontation)

Incident: Kidnapping involving suspect Melvin Porter, ex-girlfriend, and coworker; officer-involved shooting following confrontation

Outcome: Suspect shot and killed by responding officers; hostages rescued

If a specific case number, report number, or event ID exists for this incident, please use it to locate and fulfill the request.

I request all records in digital/electronic format (e.g., PDF for documents, MP4 or similar for video files) via email attachment, secure download link, or other electronic means to minimize costs and processing time.

Fee Notification and Estimate Request:
Before proceeding with any search, examination, redaction, or production that would incur fees, please provide a detailed, itemized written estimate of all anticipated costs (including labor for review/redaction, duplication, and transfer). I agree to pay reasonable fees but would like the opportunity to review the estimate, narrow the scope, or withdraw portions if costs are prohibitive. If a deposit is required, please include that in the estimate.

Given the journalistic and public interest nature of this request, I ask that you consider any applicable fee reductions or waivers for non-commercial, public benefit use.

If any portion of this request is denied, redacted, or withheld, please provide a detailed explanation of the exemption(s) claimed under the Texas Public Information Act, including the specific statutory basis, and inform me of my appeal rights.

I certify that this request is made in good faith and that the records sought are for journalistic and educational purposes.

Thank you for your prompt attention. Please acknowledge receipt and provide a tracking/reference number.

Sincerely,
Andrej Ilic
andrej.ilic@wildvision.io

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 calendar days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Andrej Ilic
